jd:
测试架构师招聘。负责公司测试体系规划、测试平台建设、CI/CD 流水线、自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、性能测试、回归测试、缺陷跟踪、版本交付。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Python Python Python Python Python — deep language expertise.
Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest — framework internals and design.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — performance and schema review.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — system internals and shell.
Git Git Git Git Git — branching, code review, hooks.
JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA — workflows, dashboards, automation.

需要熟悉自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、Web测试、APP测试、敏捷测试、回归测试、测试体系、测试用例、测试计划、缺陷跟踪、报告输出、CI/CD、Docker、Kubernetes、Jenkins、Prometheus、Grafana 等技术。6+ years QA, 2+ years architect required.
